MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-15-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Commissioner: Sue M. Kaplan, Clerks: P. Dias/Sajja R., Reporter: Adonis Duffy. Paul Arshawsky, Esq. represented Plaintiff, The John Stewart Company, Inc. and Defendant, Rabah Muhammad appeared in pro per. The Case settled per written stipulation of parties on the record. Trial date is vacated.
